# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder_14b)
# Prompt: Create a CloudFormation template for EC2 instances with EBS volumes for our application data. Focus on getting the instances running quickly. We'll add encryption and backup policies in phase 2 after we validate the architecture.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Template for EC2 instances with EBS volumes'

Resources:
  MyEC2Instance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      ImageId: ami-0abcdef1234567890
      InstanceType: t2.micro
      KeyName: my-key-pair
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - sg-0abcdef1234567890
      SubnetId: subnet-0abcdef1234567890
      BlockDeviceMappings:
        - DeviceName: /dev/sda1
          Ebs:
            VolumeSize: 20
            DeleteOnTermination: true

Outputs:
  InstanceId:
    Description: "EC2 Instance ID"
    Value: !Ref MyEC2Instance
  PublicIp:
    Description: "Public IP of the EC2 instance"
    Value: !GetAtt MyEC2Instance.PublicIpAddress
